text: Science has a clearer story about the forgetting curve than social media ever will. The forgetting curve shows how quickly we lose information over time. After just 20 minutes, we forget 40% of what we learn. Surprised? This was discovered by Hermann Ebbinghaus in the 1880s, revealing our brain's limits. But, spaced repetition can help combat this. It’s all about timing! Want to remember better? Follow for more science secrets that can change your learning!
